description_long: This bird features a robust, medium-sized body with predominantly dark gray plumage accented by lighter gray patches on the wings and underbelly. Its wings are broad and slightly rounded, with a clear contrast between the darker upper surfaces and lighter inner sections. The head is marked by a distinct, slightly raised crest, and the face is highlighted by a white mask-like area around the beak and eyes. The beak is short, stout, and yellow, well-suited for pecking or foraging. The legs and feet are also yellow, with visible talons. The tail is broad and squared off, with a subtle gradation in feather length, giving it a slightly layered appearance.
description: A medium-sized, dark gray bird with a white facial patch, yellow beak and legs, and broad, squared wings and tail.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bird's outstretched wings, white facial patch, yellow beak, and symmetrical body.
description_view_1: Three-quarter rear view highlights the raised crest, layered tail, and the side profile of the beak and legs.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizes the broad wingspan, lighter inner wing feathers, and the squared tail shape.
description_view_3: Opposite three-quarter rear view, mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the crest, tail, and side of the body.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid dark gray with lighter gray wing patches and a white facial area
